meaning: adj.无法攻取的,要塞坚固的,不受影响的,可以受孕的的
examples: The team built up an impregnable 5-1 lead.
The old Dutch fort with its thick high walls looks virtually impregnable.
The lawyer won his case with an impregnable argument.
The landing beaches will be as impregnable as any such beaches can be made.
Costa Concordia was supposed to be impregnable, but it capsized off the Italian coast.
